heading: Travel expenses of certain employees
label: 7424 Travel expenses of certain employees
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 4108(d) and 4113 of this title prior to the repeal of those sections as part of the complete revision of chapter 73 of this title by .Pub. L. 102–40
Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). substituted “Under Secretary for Health” for “Chief Medical Director”.Pub. L. 102–405
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). substituted “Under Secretary for Health” for “Chief Medical Director”.Pub. L. 102–405

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary may pay the expenses (other than membership fees) of persons described in sections 7306 and 7401(1) of this title (including persons in positions described in who are appointed on a temporary full-time basis or a part-time basis under ) who are detailed by the Under Secretary for Health to attend meetings of associations for the promotion of medical and related science.section 7401(1) of this titlesection 7405 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: in connection with their attendance at meetings or in performing advisory services concerned with the functions or activities of the Department; or

children.label: B
children.text: in connection with acceptance of significant awards or with activity related thereto concerned with functions or activities of the Department.

Any such payment may be retained by such officers and employees to cover the cost of such expenses or shall be deposited to the credit of the appropriation from which the cost of such expenses is paid, as may be provided in such regulations.
